response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed video content: Introduction of a new original song 'キミの秒針' by Yuzuki Choco for her 2026 birthday event. 2. Identified the song title 'キミの秒針' from on-screen text. 3. Searched for lyrics using 'キミの秒針 癒月ちょこ 歌詞' and 'キミの秒針 癒月ちょこ'. Results indicated this is a new/exclusive original song and lyrics were not available online. 4. Identified the song as an original by Yuzuki Choco, with music production credited to '合同会社 VESSEL LIFE'. 5. Divided the video into scenes based on content (intro/talk, credits with BGM, closing). 6. Set lyrics to null due to unavailability of the official lyrics online.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Yuzuki Choco presenting her new original song 'キミの秒針' during her 2026 birthday event. The song is featured as background music during the credits.

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco on stage, introducing her new original song, 'キミの秒針'.
Credits roll while the new song 'キミの秒針' plays as background music.
Closing image of the birthday event.
